mapper.insert: INSERT INTO halfauto_add_record (position_id, symbol, position_side, trigger_price, last_add_price, add_margin, leverage, quantity, add_count) VALUES (#{positionId}, #{symbol}, #{positionSide}, #{triggerPrice}, #{lastAddPrice}, #{addMargin}, #{leverage}, #{quantity}, #{addCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, position_id, symbol, position_side, trigger_price, last_add_price, add_margin, leverage, quantity, add_count, created_at FROM halfauto_add_record WHERE position_id = #{positionId} ORDER BY add_count DESC LIMIT 1
